Education

M.S. in Business Analytics

Institution

University of Miami

Degree Obtained

Master of Science

Field of Study

Business Analytics

Start Date - End Date

2023 - 2024

Website

https://bit.ly/3tn7xkb

Unweighted GPA

3.70

Activities & Societies

  • Selected Participant, The Early Career Professionals’ Network (ECPN), INFORMS
    • Successfully applied and was selected as one of 30 professionals nationwide to join The Early Career Professionals’ Network (ECPN) by The Institute for Operations Research and the Management Sciences (INFORMS)
    • The ECPN offers a unique platform to connect, learn, and grow with other early career professionals in the field of analytics, operations research, and management sciences
    • This opportunity allows me to engage with industry leaders, participate in exclusive networking events, and gain insights into the latest trends and best practices in the industry

  • MAS 652 - Business Analytics Capstone Project
  • MGT 642 - Supply Chain Analytics
  • MGT 697 - Graduate Business Career Connect
  • MKT 675 - Marketing Analytics
